title: lactuca viminea subsp. alpestris
intro: Lactuca viminea subsp. alpestris, also known as Alpine Prickly Lettuce, is a subspecies of plant in the Lactuca genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. In herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to promote relaxation and soothe digestive issues.
